# kemp_hosts_entry (Resource)

Manages a hosts file entry on a Kemp LoadMaster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_hosts_entry" "example" {
  ip_address = "10.0.0.5"
  fqdn       = "internal.example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fqdn` (String) **Required.** Fully qualified domain name for the hosts entry. Forces replacement if changed.
- `ip_address` (String) **Required.** IP address for the hosts entry. Forces replacement if changed.
